name: CS4218 AI Test Result Analyser (With Memory)

nodes.name: Post GitHub PR Comment
nodes.notes: Uses your personal PAT — permanent, never expires. Replace YOUR_PAT_HERE with your github_pat_... token.

nodes.name: Merge History1
nodes.notes: NODE B — Attaches Google Sheets history to the webhook payload. Build Claude Payload reads from this node.

nodes.name: Extract Failed Names1
nodes.notes: NODE C — Prepares a clean row to write to Google Sheets. Runs in parallel with Post GitHub PR Comment.

nodes.name: Append Row to Sheets1
nodes.notes: NODE D — Writes this run's results to Google Sheets so future runs can use it as history for flaky detection.

nodes.name: GitHub CI Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives test results from GitHub Actions CI. Entry point of the workflow.

nodes.name: Build Claude Payload
nodes.notes: Reads from Merge History node now (not directly from webhook). History is passed to Claude so it can detect flaky tests across runs.

nodes.name: Format PR Comment
nodes.notes: Now includes a Flaky Tests section that only appears when memory has detected repeated failures.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'analysis_complete', health: $('Format PR Comment').first().json.analysis.run_summary.overall_health, pr_comment: $('Format PR Comment').first().json.pr_comment }) }}
